mapper.select:
SELECT pl.total_spaces,
-- 현재 주차 대수 (IN은 있고 OUT이 없는 차량번호 기준) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS current_count,
-- 남은 자리 pl.total_spaces - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS available_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 등록차량 (vehicle_id IS NOT NULL) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS registered_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 방문차량 (visitor_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.visitor_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS visitor_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 고정방문차량 (fixed_visitor_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.fixed_visitor_vehicle_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS fixed_visitor_count,
-- 현재 주차 중인 미등록차량 -- vehicle_id / visitor_vehicle_id / fixed_visitor_vehicle_id 모두 NULL인 경우 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parking_log p_in WHERE p_in.entry_type = 'IN' AND p_in.vehicle_id IS NULL AND p_in.visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND p_in.fixed_visitor_vehicle_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM parking_log p_out WHERE p_out.entry_type = 'OUT' AND p_out.license_plate = p_in.license_plate AND p_out.logged_at > p_in.logged_at)) AS unregistered_count
FROM parking_lot pl WHERE pl.lot_id = 1
